Amended Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment & Exonerate Bond Pursuant To Penal Code Section 1166 Or In The Alternative Penal Code Section 980(B)

APPEAR: Leonor Noguez, Deputy City Atty 554-3854 for pltf & opposing party; Paul Smith, Esq. 800/833-8395 "atty-in-fact for Real Party in Interest Alex Padilla Bail Bonds, Ranger Insurance Company."
